sources.authority: ESO — Electricity System Operator EAD (Bulgarian TSO)
sources.notes: Public no-auth ESO JSON endpoint returning the last 24 hours of national system load (MW). Unofficial dashboards (e.g. eso-dashboard) poll this hook every 5 minutes; usable as a live grid-load signal for Bulgaria.

FDSNWS earthquake event query bounded to the Bulgarian landmass bbox. Returns recent events with magnitude, depth, time and location. Pan-European; bbox params scope it to Bulgaria (fallback for the Bulgarian Academy of Sciences seismic network).

sources.authority: Meteoalarm (via NIMH — National Institute of Meteorology and Hydrology)
sources.notes: Meteoalarm pan-European severe-weather warning page for Bulgaria, sourced from NIMH. Covers wind, rain, snow, heat, thunderstorm and other meteorological hazards with color-coded alert levels. (Machine-readable EDR GeoJSON endpoint requires an API key: api.meteoalarm.org/edr/v1/collections/warnings/locations?area_id=BG).

sources.authority: NIMH — National Institute of Meteorology and Hydrology (BAS)
sources.notes: NIMH current observations and analyses portal: temperature, wind, precipitation, snow cover, lightning detection, fire-preparedness index and comfort analysis across Bulgaria. HTML portal; underlying model imagery and station maps updated hourly.

EEA Discodata public SQL API over the AirQuality table. Filter by CountryCode='BG' for Bulgarian ambient air-pollution measurements (PM10, PM2.5, NO2, O3, SO2) reported under AQ eReporting. JSON responses via the public query endpoint.

sources.authority: MOEW — Ministry of Environment and Water (Bulgaria)
sources.attribution: Ministry of Environment and Water, Bulgaria
sources.notes: Bulgarian Ministry of Environment and Water portal for water-resources management, hydrology and flood-risk information. Official entry point for water/river-basin and hydrological monitoring; no public real-time JSON, use as the authoritative source homepage.

sources.authority: Energy-Charts ( supported by Universität Flensburg / BNetzA data)
sources.notes: Energy-Charts public API exposing Bulgarian electricity market and generation data (day-ahead prices, load, public power by source). No API key required; complements the ESO operational load feed.
